description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with a single stage named docker-build and a job called docker-build that uses the docker:latest image and the docker:dind service. Set the variable DOCKER_DRIVER to overlay. In the before_script, log in to the GitLab Container Registry with "docker login -u gitlab-ci-token -p $CI_JOB_TOKEN $CI_REGISTRY". In the script, run "docker build -t $CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:$CI_COMMIT_REF_SLUG ." then "docker push $CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:$CI_COMMIT_REF_SLUG". In the after_script, log out with "docker logout $CI_REGISTRY" and the job runs on every pipeline execution.
